protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: cells were washed... lysed... by adding NP-40 buffer... Nuclei were pelleted... washed... buffers... NP40... DOC... SDS... centrifuged

protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: cells were scraped in cold PBS... pelleted... treated with 0.5% NP40 buffer... Nuclei were then pelleted... washed... and lysed with HSU
